topic: A figure in my side mirror gets closer each day though nothing is behind me.
title: The Figure In My Side Mirror Gets Closer Each Day | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: A figure in my side mirror got closer each day, though nothing was ever behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: a car side mirror reflecting a distant dark figure on an empty road, headlights, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I noticed it on my drive home from work.
scenes.image_prompt: a grey highway at dusk through a windshield, taillights ahead, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: A small shape, far back. Then a little closer.
scenes.image_prompt: a side mirror showing a faint silhouette on the road horizon, deep shadow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Each morning the figure had gained a few feet.
scenes.image_prompt: a side mirror reflecting a closer dark figure standing on the asphalt, dim dawn light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: But the road behind me was always empty.
scenes.image_prompt: a view through a rear windshield of a completely empty road, overcast, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I started checking both mirrors at every light.
scenes.image_prompt: a driver hand adjusting a side mirror at a red traffic light, dim cabin glow, fog, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Only the left mirror showed him. The glass felt cold.
scenes.image_prompt: a close view of a car side mirror with a dark reflected shape, frost at the edges, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: By Friday he filled the whole mirror.
scenes.image_prompt: a side mirror almost entirely darkened by a looming silhouette, faint headlight rim, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I covered the mirror with tape and drove.
scenes.image_prompt: a car side mirror wrapped in dark tape, parking lot at dusk, dim light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then I saw him in the rearview, smiling, in my back seat.
scenes.image_prompt: a rearview mirror reflecting a dark shape seated behind the driver, faint dashboard glow, low light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I park facing the wall now, no mirrors visible.
scenes.image_prompt: a car parked nose first against a blank garage wall, dim bulb, deep shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: This morning my own reflection was a step behind me.
scenes.image_prompt: a bathroom mirror at dawn with a dim doorway behind, faint second shape in the shadows, low light, vertical 9:16 framing
